steps.title: Translate x = 5 to the corresponding year
steps.content: Since $x$ represents the number of years after 1959, when $x = 5$, we're looking at the year $1959 + 5 = 1964$.

steps.title: Interpret f(5) approximately 249 in context
steps.content:
The function $f(x) = 212(1.033)^x$ models the dollar value of the bank account.

When we compute $f(5)$, we get the account's value in dollars at year 1964.

Therefore, $f(5) \approx 249$ means the account is approximately $249$ dollars in 1964.

This directly matches the correct answer - B is correct.
